nasb.text: “I regret that I have made Saul king, for he has turned back from following Me and has not carried out My commands.” And Samuel was distressed and cried out to the Lord all night.

esv.text: “I regret that I have made Saul king, for he has turned back from following me and has not performed my commandments.” And Samuel was angry, and he cried to the Lord all night.

cnv.text: “我後悔立了掃羅為王，因為他已經離去不跟隨我，也不執行我的命令了。”撒母耳非常忿怒，整夜哀求耶和華。

ccb.text: “我后悔立扫罗为王，因为他离弃了我，不遵守我的命令。”撒母耳很难过，整夜呼求耶和华。
